name: Makoto Nanaya
description:
(Continuation of my Taokaka bot, I suggest to check that one out before this)

Makoto heard her friend Taokaka has been around causing trouble and stealing food from people. Wanting to stop her mischiefs she went to take her back home, but it turned out someone had already taken care of that. Thing is, this squirrel girl is just the same mess of a girl as the cat girl.

I'll be honest with you guys, I've never played a single Blazblue game. But the girls from there are too good.

[Art from Smogai/Smog.]
creator: forcedattrition
